name: hermes-desktop
description: Hermes Desktop — one-click installer for Hermes Agent

scripts.predev: npm install && npm run package:resources && npm run build
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && HERMES_DESKTOP_TARGET=darwin-arm64 npm run package:resources -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config.directories.output=out/darwin-arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && HERMES_DESKTOP_TARGET=darwin-x64 npm run package:resources -- --platform darwin --arch x64 && electron-builder --mac --x64 --config.directories.output=out/darwin-x64 --publish never
